content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback pipeline to explicitly incorporate the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that avoids the common trap of confirming a flawed initial output through single-perspective iterative refinement. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision while boosting refinement quality by surfacing hidden flaws that single-perspective feedback would miss.
